title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at OLX India Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at OLX India Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
OLX India Asia Pacific Associates, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Software Engineer for our Ludhiana operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About OLX India Asia Pacific Associates:
OLX India Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in MongoDB

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with OLX India Asia Pacific Associates!
